testcase.name: test_books_list_contents

failure.message: AssertionError: ielts19 not registered in /api/cambridge/books despite audioscripts shipped assert 'ielts19' in {'ielts17': {'available_tests': 4, 'book_id': 'ielts17', 'coming_soon': 0, 'description': 'Official Cambridge IELTS 17 Academic practice tests', ...}, 'ielts18': {'available_tests': 4, 'book_id': 'ielts18', 'coming_soon': 0, 'description': 'Official Cambridge IELTS 18 Academic practice tests', ...}}
